subject: Re: Resignation from Software Engineer role

previous_messages.subject: Re: Resignation from Software Engineer role
previous_messages.body:
Hi Mrinal,

Your resignation is accepted.
Considering the present business priorities, we would be setting your last working day as 29th May 2026.
Harshada will further help if you have any questions on the process.

Regards
Pawan

previous_messages.subject: Resignation from Software Engineer role
previous_messages.body:
Hey Pawan,

I am writing to formally resign from my position as a Software Engineer at Happiest Minds, effective today.
Could you please let me know what my last working day will be?

Thanks,
Mrinal Kumar.
